AutoText.Name: ref header basic
AutoText.ContentText:
Patient Name: Patient Name Patient DOB: Patient DOB Age: Patient Age Patient MRN: Patient MRN
EXAM DATE: DisplayDate

AutoText.Name: ref results picklist
ultrasound biopsy template
AutoText.ContentRTF:
{\rtf1\ansi\ansicpg1252\deff0\nouicompat\deflang1033{\fonttbl{\f0\fnil Arial;}} {\colortbl ;\red0\green0\blue0;} {\*\generator Riched20 10.0.20348}\viewkind4\uc1 \pard\cf1\f0\fs24 ref header basic\par \par ACCESSION: Accession Numbers\par \par IMPRESSION: BI-RADS:0/1/2/3/4/5/6\par Impression\par } {\xml}<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf8"?><autotext version="2" editMode="2"><fields><field type="5" start="0" length="16"><name>ref header basic</name><defaultvalue autotextId="1001" autotextName="ref header basic">Patient Name: Patient DOB: Age: Patient MRN:
EXAM DATE: </defaultvalue><customproperties><property><name>AllCaps</name><value>False</value></property></customproperties></field><field type="4" start="29" length="17" mergeid="502" mergename=""><name>Accession Numbers</name></field><field type="3" start="72" length="21"><name>BI-RADS</name><defaultvalue>2</defaultvalue><choices><choice name="0">BI-RADS category 0, Incomplete.</choice><choice name="1">BI-RADS category 1, Negative.</choice><choice name="2">BI-RADS category 2, Benign.</choice><choice name="3">BI-RADS category 3, Probably Benign.</choice><choice name="4">BI-RADS category 4, Suspicious.</choice><choice name="5">BI-RADS category 5, Highly Suggestive of Malignancy.</choice><choice name="6">BI-RADS category 6, Known Biopsy-Proven Malignancy.</choice></choices><customproperties><property><name>AllCaps</name><value>False</value></property><property><name>ImpressionField</name><value>True</value></property></customproperties></field><field type="1" start="95" length="10"><name>Impression</name><customproperties><property><name>AllCaps</name><value>False</value></property><property><name>AllowEmpty</name><value>True</value></property></customproperties></field></fields><links /><textSource><range type="12" start="0" length="16" /><range type="4" start="29" length="17" /><range type="3" start="72" length="7" /><range type="3" start="84" length="1" /><range type="1" start="95" length="10" /></textSource><snippetGroups /></autotext>
AutoText.ContentText:
ref header basic
ACCESSION: Accession Numbers
IMPRESSION: BI-RADS:0/1/2/3/4/5/6 Impression
